# Vendor files for generated decks

| File | Use |
| --- | --- |
| `serve.py` | Copy into the **output** deck folder (next to `index.html`) and run `python3 serve.py`. Serves the folder on `http://127.0.0.1:9090` by default. |
| `styles.css` | **Not shipped here** — you or your org provide a stylesheet that implements the class names in `../layouts.md`. See `../ASSETS_FOR_DECKS.md`. |
